My Projects

MSc · AI
Evolutionary Algorithm for MLP Spacecraft Landing
Applied an Evolutionary Algorithm to train a Multilayer Perceptron controller for autonomous spacecraft landing. Implemented tournament selection, uniform crossover, Gaussian mutation, and elitist replacement. Best generalisation at mutation rate 0.05.
Technology Stack
Python Neural Networks Evolutionary Algorithms Computational Intelligence
Project Code
🧬
B.Tech · ML
Hepatitis C Prediction Model
Developed a machine learning model to predict Hepatitis C infection from patient data. Applied supervised learning techniques and built end-to-end data preprocessing and predictive analytics pipelines using Python and Scikit-learn.
Technology Stack
Python Scikit-learn Predictive Analytics Jupyter Notebook
Project Code
B.Tech · Full-Stack
Library Management System
Built a full-stack library management application using Java, MySQL, HTML, and CSS. Implemented complete CRUD operations with a relational database backend and an interactive web interface for book and user management.
Technology Stack
Java MySQL HTML & CSS CRUD
Project Code
B.Tech · Research
Search Engine for Wikipedia Articles in Plaintext
Published IEEE conference paper proposing a specialised search engine for Wikipedia that presents results in plain text format. Implemented advanced text processing, NLP-based relevance ranking, inverted indexing, tokenisation, lemmatisation, and TF-IDF scoring to enhance accessibility for users with visual impairments and low-bandwidth connections.
Technology Stack
Python NLP Information Retrieval TF-IDF IEEE Publication
Conference Paper
🧠
MSc · NLP
NLP Analysis of Biographical Text using spaCy
Applied NLP techniques to analyse a biographical text using spaCy's en_core_web_sm pipeline. Performed tokenisation (302 words, 176 unique), POS tagging, Named Entity Recognition (identifying Edinburgh Napier University, Scotland), dependency parsing, and N-gram feature extraction — generating 755 unique unigram, bigram, and trigram features.
Technology Stack
Python spaCy NLTK NLP Edinburgh Napier · MSc
MSc · NLP
Fake News Detection using TF-IDF & Linear SVC
Built a fake news binary classifier achieving 99.92% test accuracy and 0.9992 macro F1, outperforming Naive Bayes and Logistic Regression baselines. Pipeline included custom stop-word removal, WordNet lemmatisation, TF-IDF vectorisation (50k bigram features), and hyperparameter tuning with Weights & Biases grid sweep across 12 configurations.
Technology Stack
Python Scikit-learn TF-IDF Linear SVC W&B Edinburgh Napier · MSc
MSc · BI
NHS Digital Transformation — Power BI Dashboard
Designed and built an interactive Power BI portfolio overview dashboard for NHS digital transformation, tracking 755K total budget, 589K actual spend, implementation progress, and project status across 25 NHS programmes. Analysed ERP integration, Lean-Agile BPM strategy, and ethical data governance frameworks (UK GDPR, DPA 2018) for patient-centred healthcare.
Technology Stack
Power BI DAX Business Intelligence NHS Data Edinburgh Napier · MSc
